creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: Small update on this. I ran the Alder Lake system on only the 2 P cores for at least three days with no panics. I tried switch to only 8 E cores and the system crashed again. I am back to P cores. I believe al crashes appeared to be tied to VFS/UFS activity, but I lost m core files except for the crasg today and the one one I posted to this ticket.
